content.en:
Zhang Lingshen will attack and kill the Stone Dragon Holy Lord, and this similar scene is playing out in the two universes.

The Tibetan God Organization is the initiator and mastermind behind the dual universe era, although the Earth Lords and Divine Generals of the two universes pretend to cooperate with the Lords of the Tibetan God Organization, but they will not really serve the Tibetan God Organization.

Even though the Dual Universe Age is the most suitable era for transcendence, if they fully assist the reincarnated people of the Tibetan God Organization, wouldn't they have extinguished their hopes of transcendence?

Besides, in the era of the dual universe, if you don't detach, you will almost fall with the universe, what can the Tibetan God Organization help?

Therefore, the Tibetan God Organization is also an enemy to the Earth Lords and Divine Generals of the Dual Universe.

Of course, there are also many Dizun who secretly continue to cooperate with the Tibetan God Organization to seek a chance for detachment.

Now, the Tibetan God Organization is truly born, and it is crazy to attack and take revenge on those earth deities.

All of a sudden, many Earth Venerables fell, and even the Ten Star Earth Venerables fell, and the loss of the Eternal Universe was undoubtedly the worst, and the Earth Venerables of the Twelve Universe Era lost dozens of them.

The weakest of these dozens were all Nine-Star Earth Venerables, and one of them had a Ten-Star Earth Venerable who had also fallen.

Of course.

The reincarnated ones were not without losses, and under the action of the ancient gods, three reincarnated people were killed.

After a century of turmoil, the situation has gradually stabilized.

The reincarnations of the Tibetan God Organization jointly formed the Tibetan God Temple, one hall and two universes, but at present, the Tibetan God Temple is still in a half-hidden and half-visible state, and it is impossible to fully reveal it in the eyes of the gods, otherwise it will be easy to be targeted.

But even so, the power of the Tibetan God Temple is very strong, and there is more than one god general.

The many forces of the two universes united against the Tibetan God Temple, which barely suppressed the Tibetan God Temple, but with the passage of time, the strength of the Tibetan God Temple grew rapidly, and many god-level powerhouses were born, which was the real disaster.

Cangyu Universe.

In the Canglong Holy Land, two gods are deliberating.

They are the Canglong God General and the Weeping Blood God General of the Canglong Holy Land, the Canglong God General is the God General of the early stage of the two stars, and the Weeping Blood God will be the peak God General of the first star, and the two God Generals are among the top few in the Cangyu Universe, and their strength is extremely powerful.

The Canglong Holy Land is also one of the main forces against the Tibetan Temple.

"Canglong, the Tibetan God Temple is a great disaster! When that Venerable Lord cooperated with us, he himself was using us, after all, without our help, they would not be able to carry out the Dual Universe Transcendence Plan at all. Now that the plan is complete, we are naturally abandoned. Those reincarnated people in the Tibetan God Temple are the ones that His Holiness really values, they themselves are the god generals of the Tibetan God Organization, and they are reincarnated in our universe, in case they regain their peak strength, maybe there will be three or four star god generals among them!"

"Weeping blood, you think too much!" Canglong said with a smile: "There are not many three- or four-star god generals in the chaos, almost all of them are real geniuses of some forces, and they have a bright future, so they may not be willing to invest in it." At most, these Hidden Gods are just one or two star gods, and these reincarnated beings are reincarnated into two universes, and they must follow the path of the universe and comprehend the rules of the universe, otherwise they will not be able to transcend. Otherwise, wouldn't it be possible for a random person to be reincarnated and be able to transcend? Those gods born from the Tibetan God Temple will almost exhaust their foundation, and even the Great Dao may not be stable, and even have defects, and it will take a long time to make up for it in order to fit into the dual universes, otherwise they will be at most the strongest in the universe, and there is no hope for transcendence. "

"Canglong, your inheritance is not simple, do you even know such secrets?" the Weeping Blood God was surprised.

"Hahaha, I just happen to know, in short, for the weaker gods or earth deities, the Tibetan God Temple is indeed a big threat, but for us, the Tibetan God Temple is not much of a threat, just a competitor similar to us. But you can't underestimate the Tibetan Temple, and no one knows if the Tibetan Temple hides a true genius. "

The dragon god will say.

"Hmm!"

The Weeping Blood God nodded.

......

In the Ancient Demon Cave, Ye Tian was still cultivating, although he also knew that the Tibetan God Temple was born, but he didn't pay much attention to it.

In his opinion, the innate strength of those reincarnated people of the Tibetan God Organization may not be good, otherwise they would not have sought the opportunity of the cosmic transcendent.

By chatting with Ushiru, he also learned about some of the situations in the chaos.

Some real geniuses in the chaos are not ordinary detached, and it is impossible to reincarnate in the universe and take the path of transcendence, which is not worth it.

For example, the great power of the Convergence Dao in Chaos, among which the number of transcendents is very small, and the real powerful ones are basically Chaos native cultivators, although it is because of the scarcity of the number of transcendents, but the real top geniuses of Chaos are also rare!

Therefore, Ye Tian was not worried about how talented the person who was reincarnated by such a small chaotic force as the Tibetan God Organization would be, and there was no threat to him at all.

At the moment, the most important thing is that he improves his strength.

If the people of the Tibetan Temple dare to attack the idea of the human race, it is to find death.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already cultivated the Xuanxuan Jue to the third layer of the Xiaocheng realm, and his physical strength had increased a lot, and his strength had increased greatly.

In addition, the aura on his body that belongs to the eternal universe is already very faint, and his identity will basically not be revealed.

"It's time to go to the Ancient Demon Tower!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Shout!

Ye Tian shuttled to the Ancient Demon Tower, and soon came to the foot of the Ancient Demon Tower.

The Great Hall of the Ancient Magic Tower.

Ye Tian walked in and immediately attracted the attention of all the earth lords, and even attracted the attention of a god general.

Obviously, this god general is constantly being honed in the Ancient Demon Tower.

The main hall of the Ancient Demon Tower is very large, comparable to a small world, so many earth lords do not need to be sent here, and some people even take out a small palace to live here.

This is not the first floor of the Ancient Demon Tower, and the only way to enter the first floor is through an ancient gate in the center of the Ancient Demon Tower.

Then.

A set of messages came from the machine spirit of the Ancient Demon Tower, informing them of the situation of the Ancient Demon Tower.

Ye Tian's arrival did not cause much sensation and attention, there were too many Earth Venerables in the Cangyu Universe, and there were countless Earth Venerables who were scattered and cultivated, and it was too normal for strange Earth Venerables to come here.

If Ye Tian's body was filled with the breath of the Eternal Universe, it would still cause turmoil, but Ye Tian's body did not have the breath of the Eternal Universe at all, but was filled with the breath of the Ancient Demon Cave and the Cangyu Universe.

Therefore, they do not suspect anything in the slightest.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the ancient gate and went to the first floor of the Ancient Demon Tower.

The first layer of the Ancient Demon Tower was a vast land, and here, Ye Tian found that his Chaos Dao, the power of the law, the divine power, the divine power, the soul, and so on were all banned by a force.

However, this power is not impossible to break, but once it is broken, it is equivalent to failing the assessment and being expelled from the Ancient Demon Tower.

"It's similar to the means of the source land, but it's much worse than the source land, at least, I can't resist when I enter the source land, but the suppression of the ancient magic tower has a way to resist!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, when I thought that the Ancient Demon Tower was only a supreme treasure, even with the help of the power of the ancient demon cave, it was still in the category of the supreme treasure and had not reached the level of the chaos supreme treasure, so it was naturally impossible to be too rebellious.
